title: BotanyPotsTweaker
description: Adds CraftTweaker support for Botany Pots
body:
BotanyPotsTweaker adds CraftTweaker support to Botany Pots, letting users quickly modify Crops, Fertilizers, Pot Interactions and Soils.

 

While this addon is not required to modify Botany Pots recipes, it provides helper methods that make modifying recipes easier and adds replacer support. 

 

 


If you would like to support me in my modding endeavors, you can become a patron via **[![Patreon logo](https://i.imgur.com/CAJuExT.png) Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/jaredlll08)**.
